raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 3233 empowers local governments and residents to have a stronger voice on proposed oil and gas operations.",
    "AB 3233 addresses the imbalance of power between local communities and major oil corporations.",
    "The signing of AB 3233 affirms the right to clean air and water, free of oil and gas pollution.",
    "Cities and counties in California can act with confidence in their authority to protect people and wildlife from toxic oil drilling.",
    "The courts have a clear mandate to allow cities to limit oil and gas drilling."
```
